build.command: cd tooling-core && rm -rf dist && tsc --noCheck -p tsconfig.json
//: --noCheck (TS 5.5+): emit JS without type checking — fast transpile-only build.
Type correctness is enforced by the developer's IDE and by check:types in CI.
See build-tools-workspace/project.json check:types and nx.json for the full picture.

test.command: cd tooling-core && npx vitest run --config vitest.config.ts

//: --noEmit: run the full type checker but write nothing to disk.
This is the CI gate that catches what the IDE should have caught locally.
We do NOT use --noCheck here — that would defeat the purpose.
dependsOn ^build ensures dependency .d.ts files exist before we typecheck.
